problem id: 9ab82dfb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01100000 -> 00001100
  00101001 -> 01000101
  01011001 -> 01001011
  10100100 -> 00010100
  01011010 -> 10001011
  10011010 -> 10010011
  10010100 -> 00010010
  01010101 -> 01001010
  11011001 -> 01011011

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 10011100
